message:
feat(test): expand search/indexing.rs inline tests from 10 to 67

Add 57 new unit tests for the search indexing pipeline covering:
- SearchDocumentSource: as_tag all variants, serde roundtrip, equality
- ScrollbackLine: constructor defaults, serde roundtrip
- IndexableDocument: text constructor, dedupe_basis for text vs pane_metadata
- normalize_index_text: plain text, whitespace collapse, blank lines, empty
- strip_ansi_sequences: CSI, OSC with BEL, OSC with ST, no sequences
- sha256_hex: determinism, different inputs
- validate_config: all 4 error paths + success
- IndexingConfig: default values
- chunk_scrollback_lines: empty, single, gap split, blank line split
- extract_command_output_blocks: empty, OSC-133 markers, no-prompts fallback
- extract_agent_artifacts: code blocks, errors, tool traces, empty, dedup
- SearchIndex::search: empty query, zero limit, occurrence ranking
- SearchIndex::stats: empty index, freshness calculation
- SearchIndex::reindex: clears and rebuilds
- Rate limiting: max_docs_per_second, window reset after 1s
- SearchIndexError: Display for Io, InvalidConfig, UnsupportedStateVersion
- IngestReport/TickResult: Default values
- tick/flush_now: resize pause, no pending
- CassContentHashProvider: HashSet impl
- is_prompt_boundary: OSC-133 A/B/C markers, regex matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
